headline: Clear calendar and no inbound fires — use today to push the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake integrations (check env vars and install missing packages)
quick_wins.why: You're flying blind on escalations and product metrics — both feeds are broken

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance AE-1079: 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket, evals is a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR, and there's no due date — meaning it could slip indefinitely if not pushed now

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock bi-weekly TR page for any action items or follow-ups assigned to you from the 3/18 meeting
must_make_progress.why: The TR covers evals, templates, and agent lifecycle — all adjacent to your work; ensure you're not missing commitments

must_communicate_with.about: Align on scope and open questions for the no-ground-truth evaluation design before you finalize the doc
Confirm ML requirements or constraints for generated evaluations without ground truth

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 progress on no-ground-truth evals design
must_report_status.to: Agents leadership (likely surfaced at next bi-weekly TR)
must_report_status.note: Next TR is likely ~4/1; have a reviewable draft ready before then

flags: Salesforce integration is broken (missing simple_salesforce module) — you have zero visibility on customer escalations.
Snowflake integration is broken (missing connector) — you cannot track product metrics or funnel health.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of indefinite deferral — consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the Big Rock TR — monitor whether this creates downstream work for evals.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations or decisions surfaced today; primary business value will come from unblocking the no-ground-truth evals design which is a dependency for the 26.4 evals deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake integration; advancing AE-1079 is the most direct lever to improve eval coverage for customers without labeled data.

slack_summary: Quiet day: no meetings, no inbound fires. Top priority is making real progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc) — it's your only active ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Second, fix the broken Salesforce and Snowflake integrations so you regain visibility on escalations and metrics. Zero meetings today — use the deep-work time.
